## FiltersList class

Renders a list with a list item per each [BooleanFilter](./x-types.booleanfilter.md) in the filters prop array. Each list item has a scoped slot, passing the filter as slot prop.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class FiltersList extends FiltersList_base 
```
<b>Extends:</b> FiltersList\_base

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.filterslist.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the base filters. |
|  [cssClasses](./x-components.filterslist.cssclasses.md) |  | [VueCSSClasses](./x-components.vuecssclasses.md) | Dynamic CSS classes for the root element of this component. |
|  [hasFiltersToRender](./x-components.filterslist.hasfilterstorender.md) |  | boolean | It handles if the filters should be rendered. |
